name: Chiles Rellenos II (Spicy Meat Filled Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the beef in water until tender.
2. Once cooked, grind or puree the meat in a blender.
3. Mix the ground meat with 1 teaspoon salt, ground coriander, ground cloves, minced garlic, chopped onion, and raisins. Add enough broth to moisten the mixture and cook until thick.
4. Parboil and peel the chiles, removing the seeds and stem.
5. Stuff each chili with the meat mixture.
6. Prepare the batter by combining flour, baking powder, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a bowl. Gradually add milk and eggs, beating to form a smooth batter.
7. Dip each stuffed chili into the batter.
8. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy-based frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
9. Fry the chiles until golden brown, turning off the heat when done.
10. Keep the fried chiles warm until all are cooked.
11. Serve immediately with tomato sauce or salsa, or serve the sauce on the side.
Note: Serve hot and enjoy!
